mapper.select:
select * from t_committee a
where a.zid=#{id}

select * from t_committee a
where a.zcode=#{id}

select
a.zcode as zid, a.username as username, a.password as password, a.zname as xm, '5' as role
from t_committee a where username=#{username} and password=#{password} and sczt='0'
mapper.insert:
insert into t_committee ( zid, zcode, zname, zsex, znation, zcppost, zbirthday, zpost, zaddress, zzipcode, zarea, zofficetel, zmobiletel, zhousetel, zemail, zpartian, zsector, zedu, zdegree, ztype, znote, zsfzh, username, password, sczt )values(
#{zid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zsex,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{znation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zcppost,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zbirthday,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zpost,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zaddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zzipcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zarea,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zofficetel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zmobiletel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zhousetel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zemail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zpartian,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zsector,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zedu,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zdegree,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ztype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{znote,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zsfzh,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sczt,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
